achievements: President — Application Development Club: Founded the club to expose students to industry-standard product development. Organised bootcamps, hackathons, and seminars.
Winner at Softec'19: Built a Netflix-like mobile app in 28 hours at FAST-NU competition using Kotlin/Android, securing 1st prize and PKR 50,000.
Worked ~4–6 hours/day at Juice Phactree while studying full-time, self-financing education through professional salary.

Organized the Annual Dinner 2015, establishing a tradition that has continued as an annual event ever since. This initiative marked the beginning of the Annual Dinner tradition at the university after 22 years.

institution: Sheikh Khalifa Bin Zayed Arab Pakistani College
